day2_after_start.name: Me
day2_after_start.text: *After school. The sunset is pretty again. As I pack my bag, Ms. Eunsu approaches.*

day2_after_eunsu_phone.name: Park Eunsu
day2_after_eunsu_phone.text: "{name}, hold on. We've been having smartphone issues at school lately, so we're checking transfer students' phones."

day2_after_eunsu_phone_3.name: Park Eunsu
day2_after_eunsu_phone_3.text: "Yes, just checking for harmful apps. It'll be quick. You can show me, right?"

day2_after_eunsu_phone_choice.name: Me
day2_after_eunsu_phone_choice.text: *...If every student does it, there's no reason to refuse. But something feels off.*
choices: "Sure, here you go." (Hand over the phone)

day2_after_phone_comply.name: Park Eunsu
day2_after_phone_comply.text: "Thanks, I'll just take a quick look. ...All clean. Good student."

day2_after_phone_comply_2.name: Me
day2_after_phone_comply_2.text: *She returned my phone. But... it looked like the Settings app was open. Probably just my imagination.*

day2_after_phone_refuse.name: Park Eunsu
day2_after_phone_refuse.text: "...Alright, it's your privacy. That's fine. I got ahead of myself. Sorry."

day2_after_phone_refuse_2.name: Me
day2_after_phone_refuse_2.text: *She walked away smiling. But that smile... looked disappointed? No, almost... angry?*

day2_after_sea.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea.text: "You stayed again! I... love spending time alone with you the most, {name}."

day2_after_sea_2.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_2.text: "Hey... you went to the nurse's office earlier, right? What did you talk about with Nurse Riin?"

day2_after_sea_3.name: Me
day2_after_sea_3.text: "Just a health checkup... How did you know?"

day2_after_sea_4.name: Me
day2_after_sea_4.text: *Sea said "Just because" with a smile. But behind those smiling eyes... something cold flickered. Must be my imagination.*

day2_after_sea_5.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_5.text: "...{name}. Before you came, I was always alone in the student council room."

day2_after_sea_6.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_6.text: "Everyone kept their distance because I'm class president. Even when I tried being nice... there was always this wall. So..."

day2_after_sea_7.text: *Sea looks out the window. The sunset paints her face red. For the first time... she looks like just 'Han Sea', not the class president.*

day2_after_sea_8.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_8.text: "...I hope {name} won't be like that. I hope you won't drift away from me."

day2_after_sea_9.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_9.text: "...No matter where {name} is, no matter what you're doing, I'll always know. That's what friends are for."

day2_after_sea_10.name: Me
day2_after_sea_10.text: *...That hits me right in the heart. I've never had a friend who'd say something like that.*

day2_after_yuna.name: Choi Yuna
day2_after_yuna.text: "Senpai, I... actually wanted to tell you something..."

day2_after_yuna_2.name: Me
day2_after_yuna_2.text: *Yuna was about to say something but kept looking around nervously. As if someone was watching.*

day2_after_yuna_3.name: Choi Yuna
day2_after_yuna_3.text: "...Never mind! I'll tell you next time. It's nothing!"

day2_after_riin.name: Kang Riin
day2_after_riin.text: "My, you're here again? Looks like you've taken a liking to the nurse's office."

day2_after_riin_2.name: Me
day2_after_riin_2.text: *While Nurse Riin makes tea, I notice a document on her desk. It reads 'Subject #13 - Progress Observation Report.'*

day2_after_riin_3.name: Me
day2_after_riin_3.text: *"What's that—" I start to ask, but Nurse Riin quickly flips the paper over.*

day2_after_riin_4.name: Kang Riin
day2_after_riin_4.text: "Oh, that's just material for an academic paper. Teachers study too, you know. Here, drink your tea."

day2_after_home_seolhwa.name: Me
day2_after_home_seolhwa.text: *About to step through the school gate, I feel eyes on my back. I turn around...*

day2_after_home_seolhwa_2.name: Me
day2_after_home_seolhwa_2.text: *It's Seolhwa. Standing inside the gate, watching me. The BGM cuts out. The silence is unnervingly complete.*

day2_after_home_seolhwa_3.name: Me
day2_after_home_seolhwa_3.text: *I blink and she's gone. ...What was that? My heart is pounding.*

day2_after_end.name: Me
day2_after_end.text: *I head home. Today was a bit... strange.*
